linux.install: cd {{SERVERLOCATION}} && which java || (echo 'Java not found, please install JRE 17 manually')
linux.post_hook: cd {{SERVERLOCATION}} && id && ls -la . && wget --no-check-certificate -O server.jar https://piston-data.mojang.com/v1/objects/84194a2f286ef7c14ed7ce0090dba59902951553/server.jar && echo 'eula=true' > eula.txt

windows.post_hook: cd {{SERVERLOCATION}}; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://piston-data.mojang.com/v1/objects/84194a2f286ef7c14ed7ce0090dba59902951553/server.jar -OutFile server.jar; 'eula=true' | Out-File -Encoding ASCII eula.txt
